---
title: "Targets Pipeline Visualization"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Pipeline Dependency Graph

The pipeline dependency graph is used for {targets} pipeline.

```{r}
#| label: pipeline-graph
#| out-width: 100%
#| results: asis

myworkspace::knit_targets_mermaid()
```
